vocabulary.example_cn: 他相比如何？

vocabulary.en: a complete failure, often in a ridiculous way
vocabulary.excerpt: the whole Epstein fiasco
vocabulary.example_cn: 整个爱泼斯坦丑闻。

vocabulary.en: to focus all your attention on something
vocabulary.excerpt: the President has really zeroed in on
vocabulary.example_cn: 总统确实集中关注了这一点。

vocabulary.en: a short performance to test the suitability of a performer
vocabulary.excerpt: a soft audition for that role
vocabulary.example_cn: 对该角色的温和试镜。

vocabulary.en: a small problem or difficulty
vocabulary.excerpt: President Trump's big birthday bash for America hitting another snag.
vocabulary.example_cn: 特朗普总统为美国举办的盛大生日派对又遇到了障碍。

vocabulary.en: to leave a job or stop taking part in something
vocabulary.excerpt: six states are now bowing out.
vocabulary.example_cn: 六个州现在退出。

vocabulary.en: to spoil something or make it less pure
vocabulary.excerpt: politics will or have already tainted the celebration.
vocabulary.example_cn: 政治将会或已经玷污了庆祝活动。

vocabulary.en: strongly supporting a particular political party or group
vocabulary.excerpt: a more partisan affair than originally presented.
vocabulary.example_cn: 比最初呈现的更党派化的事件。

vocabulary.en: to make something increase or become more intense
vocabulary.excerpt: wanting to stoke some of these fears
vocabulary.example_cn: 想要煽动这些恐惧。

vocabulary.en: after something, usually something bad
vocabulary.excerpt: in the wake of all that backlash
vocabulary.example_cn: 在所有这些反对之后。

vocabulary.cn: 雪花玻璃球；比喻混乱状态
vocabulary.en: a transparent sphere containing a miniature scene and artificial snow; used metaphorically for a chaotic situation
vocabulary.excerpt: This whole world is like a snow globe
vocabulary.example_cn: 整个世界就像一个雪花玻璃球。

vocabulary.en: to involve someone or something in a situation that they do not want to be involved in
vocabulary.excerpt: music is dragged into politics.
vocabulary.example_cn: 音乐被拖入政治。

vocabulary.en: so silly that it makes you laugh
vocabulary.excerpt: is kind of laughable.
vocabulary.example_cn: 有点可笑。

vocabulary.en: to cut a pattern or picture into a surface
vocabulary.excerpt: etched 8647 into the grass
vocabulary.example_cn: 在草地上蚀刻了8647。

vocabulary.en: the crime of intentionally damaging property
vocabulary.excerpt: a case of vandalism on the National Mall.
vocabulary.example_cn: 国家广场上的一起故意破坏案件。

vocabulary.en: behaving in a wild or strange way, especially because of mental illness
vocabulary.excerpt: deranged vandalism
vocabulary.example_cn: 疯狂的破坏行为。

vocabulary.en: based on what appears to be true, without looking deeper
vocabulary.excerpt: on its face, it's not a threat
vocabulary.example_cn: 从表面上看，这不是威胁。

vocabulary.en: not clear; difficult to see or understand
vocabulary.excerpt: The line between that can be quite blurry.
vocabulary.example_cn: 两者之间的界限可能相当模糊。

vocabulary.en: to officially make something holy or to give something to God
vocabulary.excerpt: the US Catholic Bishops did just consecrate the United States to the Sacred Heart of Jesus.
vocabulary.example_cn: 美国天主教主教刚刚将美国奉献给耶稣圣心。

vocabulary.en: a period of time to prepare for something
vocabulary.excerpt: we had a runway since about 2018
vocabulary.example_cn: 我们从2018年左右就有了准备时间。

vocabulary.en: to push or move something forward
vocabulary.excerpt: propel the team forward.
vocabulary.example_cn: 推动团队前进。

vocabulary.en: to not be noticed or detected
vocabulary.excerpt: He's someone, I think, is flying under the radar.
vocabulary.example_cn: 我认为他是一个低调的人。

sentences.en: President Trump calling off new strikes on Iran, saying both sides have now agreed to stop the fighting.
sentences.cn: 特朗普总统取消了对伊朗的新一轮打击，称双方现已同意停止战斗。
sentences.structure: 主句（President Trump calling off...）+ 伴随状语（saying...）
sentences.analysis: 现在分词短语作伴随状语，表示主句动作发生时伴随的情况。

sentences.en: Regardless of the rhetoric, threats and claims of the other side, we are focused on the interests of the Iranian nation.
sentences.cn: 无论对方的言论、威胁和主张如何，我们都专注于伊朗国家的利益。
sentences.structure: 让步状语（Regardless of...）+ 主句（we are focused on...）
sentences.analysis: Regardless of引导让步状语，表示不考虑对方因素。

sentences.en: As I speak to you at this moment, we have not reached a final conclusion on this matter.
sentences.cn: 就在我此刻与你交谈时，我们尚未就此事达成最终结论。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句（As I speak...）+ 主句（we have not reached...）
sentences.analysis: As引导时间状语从句，表示主句动作发生的时间背景。

sentences.en: Israel, also seemingly taken by surprise, a source telling CNN Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu wasn't aware of an agreement with Iran; that he actually found out on social media.
sentences.cn: 以色列似乎也感到意外，有消息人士告诉CNN，以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡并不知晓与伊朗的协议；他实际上是在社交媒体上得知的。
sentences.structure: 主句（Israel...）+ 同位语（a source telling...）+ 宾语从句（Netanyahu wasn't aware...）
sentences.analysis: a source telling...为独立主格结构，补充说明以色列的情况。

sentences.en: So, is this just the latest effort by President Trump to move stalled negotiations forward?
sentences.cn: 那么，这仅仅是特朗普总统推动陷入僵局的谈判的最新努力吗？
sentences.structure: 一般疑问句（is this...）+ 不定式短语（to move...）作定语
sentences.analysis: 不定式短语修饰effort，表示努力的目的。

sentences.en: Based on everything we know and your sources, David, do signs actually point to an agreement at this point?
sentences.cn: 根据我们所知的一切以及你的消息来源，大卫，目前迹象是否确实指向一项协议？
sentences.structure: 条件状语（Based on...）+ 主句（do signs point to...）
sentences.analysis: 过去分词短语Based on...作条件状语，表示依据。

sentences.en: Well, they certainly point to some agreement coming together on four major pillars of a -- of some restraint on the nuclear program.
sentences.cn: 嗯，它们确实指向在四个主要支柱上达成某种协议——对核计划的一些限制。
sentences.structure: 主句（they point to...）+ 介词短语（on four major pillars...）
sentences.analysis: 介词短语on...作定语修饰agreement，说明协议的内容。

sentences.en: But it's not a peace agreement; it doesn't end the war; it may be a ceasefire that opens up another negotiation.
sentences.cn: 但这不是和平协议；它不会结束战争；它可能是一个开启另一轮谈判的停火协议。
sentences.structure: 并列句（it's not...; it doesn't...; it may be...）
sentences.analysis: 三个并列分句，最后一个包含that引导的定语从句修饰ceasefire。

sentences.en: The fact that Israel's prime minister reportedly found out about this on social media, that really stands out to me, especially when we're talking about the potential ceasefire with Lebanon, with activity in Lebanon -- David.
sentences.cn: 以色列总理据报道是在社交媒体上得知此事的，这一点让我印象深刻，尤其是当我们谈论与黎巴嫩可能达成的停火以及黎巴嫩境内的活动时——大卫。
sentences.structure: 主语（The fact that...）+ 谓语（stands out）+ 时间状语从句（when we're talking...）
sentences.analysis: that引导同位语从句说明fact的内容。

sentences.en: The prime minister does not want to be part of this agreement and has made clear that he won't feel bound by a commitment that he didn't sign up to.
sentences.cn: 总理不想参与这项协议，并明确表示他不会受他没有签署的承诺的约束。
sentences.structure: 并列谓语（does not want... and has made clear）+ 宾语从句（that he won't feel bound...）+ 定语从句（that he didn't sign up to）
sentences.analysis: 宾语从句中嵌套定语从句修饰commitment。

sentences.en: And it does pose a real point of tension in the relationship with Israel, because if they don't respect that ceasefire, and it plunges everything back in again, you'll have the president blaming Prime Minister Netanyahu.
sentences.cn: 这确实给与以色列的关系带来了一个真正的紧张点，因为如果他们不尊重停火协议，导致一切再次陷入混乱，总统就会指责内塔尼亚胡总理。
sentences.structure: 主句（it does pose...）+ 原因状语从句（because...）+ 条件状语从句（if they don't...）+ 结果主句（you'll have...）
sentences.analysis: 多层状语嵌套，条件状语从句中包含并列谓语。

sentences.en: Every time the president talks about how eager Iran is for a deal, it's basically a reveal that he's talking about his own eagerness for a deal.
sentences.cn: 每次总统谈论伊朗多么渴望达成协议时，这基本上是在透露他本人对协议的渴望。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句（Every time...）+ 主句（it's basically a reveal...）+ 同位语从句（that he's talking...）
sentences.analysis: Every time引导时间状语从句，主句中that引导同位语从句说明reveal的内容。

sentences.en: But frankly, the problem that's been haunting the president here is that 38 days of pounding the Iranians, starting in late February, did not result in the political concessions he was looking for.
sentences.cn: 但坦率地说，困扰总统的问题是，从2月底开始的38天对伊朗的猛烈打击并没有带来他所寻求的政治让步。
sentences.structure: 主句（the problem... is that...）+ 定语从句（that's been haunting...）+ 表语从句（that 38 days... did not result in...）+ 定语从句（he was looking for）
sentences.analysis: 主句主语problem后接定语从句，系动词is后接表语从句，表语从句中嵌套定语从句。

sentences.en: Now, I reported two days ago that there were four pillars of an agreement that are emerging, and they have to do with everything from what to do with Iran's nuclear stockpile to its future enrichment activity, and so forth.
sentences.cn: 两天前我报道说，一项协议有四个支柱正在浮现，它们涉及从如何处理伊朗的核库存到其未来的浓缩活动等方方面面。
sentences.structure: 主句（I reported...）+ 宾语从句（that there were...）+ 定语从句（that are emerging）+ 并列句（and they have to do with...）
sentences.analysis: 宾语从句中包含定语从句，并列句补充说明。

sentences.en: But all this memorandum of agreement would -- of understanding would do is start a negotiation that would probably run all summer, and many fear could run much longer than that, on the details of the nuclear program.
sentences.cn: 但这份谅解备忘录所能做的只是开启一场可能持续整个夏天的谈判，许多人担心可能会持续更久，讨论核计划的细节。
sentences.structure: 主语（all this memorandum...）+ 谓语（would do is start...）+ 定语从句（that would probably run...）+ 并列谓语（and many fear could run...）
sentences.analysis: 主语后省略了that的定语从句，谓语部分包含不定式短语作表语，定语从句修饰negotiation。

sentences.en: Among them is South Carolina Congresswoman Nancy Mace, fresh off her last-place finish for the GOP nomination for governor in her state, joking that she could still come in first, if Mike Pence has the courage.
sentences.cn: 其中包括南卡罗来纳州众议员南希·梅斯，她刚刚在该州共和党州长提名中排名垫底，开玩笑说如果迈克·彭斯有勇气，她仍然可以排名第一。
sentences.structure: 倒装句（Among them is...）+ 同位语（fresh off...）+ 伴随状语（joking that...）+ 条件状语从句（if Mike Pence...）
sentences.analysis: 倒装结构强调地点，现在分词短语作伴随状语，内含宾语从句和条件状语从句。

sentences.en: Texas Senator John Cornyn, in his first interview since that loss to a Trump-backed challenger in his primary in Texas, telling "The New York Times," quote, "It is going to be a pretty bumpy ride for the next seven months," saying, "It does give some of us a little more freedom and certainly leverage."
sentences.cn: 得克萨斯州参议员约翰·科宁在得克萨斯州初选中输给特朗普支持的挑战者后首次接受采访，告诉《纽约时报》，“未来七个月将会非常坎坷”，并说“这确实给了我们一些人更多的自由，当然还有影响力。”
sentences.structure: 主语（Texas Senator John Cornyn）+ 状语（in his first interview...）+ 谓语（telling...）+ 直接引语（"It is going to be..."）+ 伴随状语（saying...）
sentences.analysis: 主句谓语为telling，后接直接引语，saying为现在分词作伴随状语。

sentences.en: I was struck by noting that he gave voice, they write that he gave voice "in starkly candid terms to this growing sentiment among Senate Republicans that Trump is actually hurting his own party with self-serving decisions and his insistence on slavish loyalty, ultimately setting himself up for a midterm disaster that would pave the way for the most miserable two years of his life."
sentences.cn: 我注意到他表达了，他们写道他“以极其坦率的言辞表达了参议院共和党人中日益增长的情绪，即特朗普实际上正在以自私自利的决定和对盲目忠诚的坚持伤害自己的政党，最终让自己陷入中期选举的灾难，这将为他一生中最悲惨的两年铺平道路。”
sentences.structure: 主句（I was struck by noting that...）+ 插入语（they write that...）+ 直接引语（"in starkly candid terms..."）+ 同位语从句（that Trump is actually hurting...）+ 结果状语（ultimately setting...）+ 定语从句（that would pave...）
sentences.analysis: 句子结构复杂，包含多层嵌套。

sentences.en: And so, I think that you're right; this is probably going to be a challenge for President Trump and other conservatives for the months to come.
sentences.cn: 所以，我认为你是对的；这可能会在未来几个月对特朗普总统和其他保守派构成挑战。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think that...）+ 并列句（this is probably going to be...）
sentences.analysis: think后接宾语从句，分号连接并列句。

sentences.en: But I would just encourage these lawmakers to remember that the American people are paying attention, and they expect this Republican Congress to actually get some things done, whether it be the SAVE America Act or another reconciliation bill.
sentences.cn: 但我只想鼓励这些议员记住，美国人民正在关注，他们期望这个共和党国会真正做成一些事情，无论是《拯救美国法案》还是另一项和解法案。
sentences.structure: 主句（I would encourage...）+ 宾语补足语（to remember...）+ 宾语从句（that the American people are paying attention...）+ 并列句（and they expect...）+ 让步状语（whether it be...）
sentences.analysis: encourage sb. to do sth.结构，remember后接宾语从句，whether引导让步状语。

sentences.en: Whereas before, they were so beholden to what Trump wanted, because they were scared of him; they didn't have any backbone to stand up against him.
sentences.cn: 而以前，他们如此受制于特朗普的意愿，因为他们害怕他；他们没有勇气站出来反对他。
sentences.structure: 对比状语从句（Whereas before...）+ 主句（they were so beholden...）+ 原因状语从句（because they were scared...）+ 并列句（they didn't have...）
sentences.analysis: Whereas引导对比，分号连接并列句。

sentences.en: And they've done nothing to go up against Trump to say, Look, you promised the American people to bring down costs, to bring down inflation; and everything that you're doing is doing exactly the opposite of that.
sentences.cn: 他们没有采取任何行动反对特朗普，说，看，你向美国人民承诺降低物价，降低通货膨胀；而你所做的一切恰恰相反。
sentences.structure: 主句（they've done nothing...）+ 不定式短语（to go up against...）+ 直接引语（"Look, you promised..."）+ 并列句（and everything that you're doing is doing...）
sentences.analysis: 不定式短语作目的状语，直接引语中包含并列谓语。

sentences.en: I don't understand exactly what the return on investment is; I mean, I sort of get the generic arguments that are made about the value of sport in building community and cultivating good kinds of traits and character.
sentences.cn: 我不太明白投资回报是什么；我的意思是，我大致理解关于体育在建设社区和培养良好品质方面的价值的一般性论点。
sentences.structure: 主句（I don't understand...）+ 宾语从句（what the return... is）+ 分号连接并列句（I mean...）+ 宾语从句（I sort of get...）+ 定语从句（that are made...）
sentences.analysis: 第一个分句包含宾语从句，第二个分句包含定语从句。

sentences.en: But in terms of, like -- I mean, if Donald Trump doesn't believe in soft power, it is very, very difficult for me to understand how this is a different but more enlightened version of it.
sentences.cn: 但就——我的意思是，如果唐纳德·特朗普不相信软实力，我很难理解这如何是一种不同但更开明的版本。
sentences.structure: 条件状语从句（if Donald Trump doesn't believe...）+ 主句（it is very difficult for me to understand...）+ 宾语从句（how this is...）
sentences.analysis: it作形式主语，真正主语为不定式短语，内含宾语从句。

sentences.en: I think, to me, the lesson I take from all of this is, listen, could there be some kind of benefit down the road?
sentences.cn: 我认为，对我来说，我从这一切中得到的教训是，听着，未来会不会有某种好处？
sentences.structure: 主句（I think...）+ 插入语（to me）+ 定语从句（I take from all of this）+ 表语从句（is, listen, could there be...）
sentences.analysis: 表语从句为一般疑问句形式。

sentences.en: But that's really not how I understand the nature of this relationship; that, if you look at the White House lawn, and if you look at the way in which the parent company for UFC -- it's called TKO -- they also own WWE, if you just look at the way in which they do business, every year seems to greet or bring with it a new level of entanglement in government.
sentences.cn: 但这并不是我理解这种关系本质的方式；如果你看看白宫草坪，如果你看看UFC的母公司——它叫TKO——他们也拥有WWE，如果你看看他们做生意的方式，每年似乎都会带来与政府的新一层纠缠。
sentences.structure: 主句（that's really not how...）+ 分号连接并列句（that, if you look...）+ 条件状语从句（if you look...）+ 主句（every year seems to...）
sentences.analysis: 第二个分句包含多个条件状语从句，主句为every year seems to...。

sentences.en: It's this enmeshing of the business between the public and the private in which they're talking about, but it extends well beyond this memorandum of understanding.
sentences.cn: 正是这种他们正在谈论的公私业务纠缠，但它远远超出了这份谅解备忘录。
sentences.structure: 强调句（It's this enmeshing...）+ 定语从句（in which they're talking about）+ 转折并列句（but it extends...）
sentences.analysis: 强调句结构，定语从句修饰enmeshing。

sentences.en: And I know for sports fans out there, you're saying, well, you know, government largesse isn't necessarily a new thing for pro sports owners; fine; but it's at least worth having a conversation about the role that it plays.
sentences.cn: 我知道对于体育迷来说，你们会说，嗯，你知道，政府的慷慨对职业体育老板来说并不新鲜；好吧；但至少值得讨论一下它所扮演的角色。
sentences.structure: 主句（I know...）+ 直接引语（you're saying...）+ 并列句（but it's at least worth...）+ 定语从句（that it plays）
sentences.analysis: 直接引语中包含分号连接的并列句。

sentences.en: What do you think, in your view Sunday's fight has now come to symbolize?
sentences.cn: 你认为，在你看来，周日的比赛现在象征着什么？
sentences.structure: 特殊疑问句（What do you think...）+ 插入语（in your view）+ 宾语从句（Sunday's fight has come to symbolize）
sentences.analysis: do you think为插入语，宾语从句为what引导的从句。

sentences.en: You could even argue maybe that it's not so much a one and done kind of an event, although that's what they're suggesting, but that rather it marks a new period of entanglement between them.
sentences.cn: 你甚至可以说，这与其说是一次性的事件（尽管他们暗示如此），不如说标志着他们之间纠缠的新时期。
sentences.structure: 主句+宾语从句（that...）+让步状语从句（although...）+转折（but rather...）
sentences.analysis: 主句为'You could even argue'，后接宾语从句'that it's not so much...but rather...'。'not so much...but rather'结构表示'与其说……不如说……'。'although that's what they're suggesting'为让步状语从句。

sentences.en: What was very interesting was the UFC helped launder Donald Trump's reputation following January 6th all the way through into 2024, when they helped boost his candidacy.
sentences.cn: 非常有趣的是，UFC在1月6日事件后帮助洗刷了唐纳德·特朗普的声誉，一直持续到2024年，当时他们帮助提升了他的候选人资格。
sentences.structure: 主语从句（What was very interesting）+系动词+表语从句（the UFC helped...）+时间状语从句（when...）
sentences.analysis: 主语从句'What was very interesting'作主语，系动词'was'后接表语从句'the UFC helped...'。'following January 6th'为时间状语，'all the way through into 2024'为时间范围，'when they helped boost his candidacy'为非限制性定语从句修饰2024。

sentences.en: I get asked all the time, do you think the UFC risks being seen as political? I'm like, risk is being seen.
sentences.cn: 我经常被问到，你认为UFC有被视为政治化的风险吗？我的回答是，它已经被视为政治化了。
sentences.structure: 主句（I get asked）+直接引语（do you think...）+省略句（I'm like...）
sentences.analysis: 第一句为被动语态，'get asked'后接直接引语。第二句'I'm like'为口语化表达，相当于'I say'，后接省略句'risk is being seen'，意为'风险已经被看到了'，即已经政治化了。

sentences.en: There are Department of Justice regulations specifically designed to prevent those kind of statements and that kind of activity, because the department and lawyers, and election experts, have long viewed that kind of behavior by the Justice Department as dangerous because it might cast doubt upon the election.
sentences.cn: 司法部有专门旨在防止此类言论和活动的规定，因为该部门、律师和选举专家长期以来一直认为司法部的此类行为是危险的，因为它可能会对选举产生怀疑。
sentences.structure: There be句型+过去分词短语作定语（designed to...）+原因状语从句（because...）+宾语补足语（viewed...as...）+原因状语从句（because...）
sentences.analysis: 主句为'There are...regulations'，'designed to...'修饰regulations。第一个'because'引导原因状语从句，其中'viewed...as dangerous'为动词+宾语+宾补结构。第二个'because'引导原因状语从句解释为何危险。

sentences.en: And like everything that, or many things that the President does, it's based on who he likes and how loyal he believes they are.
sentences.cn: 就像总统所做的所有事情，或者说许多事情一样，这基于他喜欢谁以及他认为他们有多忠诚。
sentences.structure: 介词短语（Like...）+插入语（or many things...）+主句（it's based on...）+宾语从句（who...and how...）
sentences.analysis: 'Like everything that...'为介词短语作状语，'that the President does'为定语从句修饰everything。插入语'or many things that the President does'补充说明。主句'it's based on'后接两个并列的宾语从句：'who he likes'和'how loyal he believes they are'。

sentences.en: And I think it helps to understand what's happening here if you just realize that the DNI in Trump's mind is an election investigating operation, which I think a lot of intelligence officials would say that's only a pretty small part of the DNI's job.
sentences.cn: 我认为，如果你意识到在特朗普心目中，国家情报总监是一个选举调查机构，这有助于理解这里发生的事情，而我认为许多情报官员会说这只是国家情报总监工作中很小的一部分。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+宾语从句（it helps to understand...）+条件状语从句（if you realize...）+宾语从句（that the DNI...）+非限制性定语从句（which...）+插入语（I think）+宾语从句（that's...）
sentences.analysis: 主句'I think'后接宾语从句'it helps to understand...'。'if you realize...'为条件状语从句，其中'that the DNI...'为realize的宾语从句。'which'引导非限制性定语从句修饰'operation'，其中包含插入语'I think'和宾语从句'that's...'。

sentences.en: I think the question is, once he takes the job or if he gets confirmed, how far is he willing to go for the President?
sentences.cn: 我认为问题是，一旦他上任或者如果他获得确认，他愿意为总统走多远？
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+表语从句（the question is...）+时间/条件状语从句（once...or if...）+直接引语（how far...）
sentences.analysis: 主句'I think'后接表语从句'the question is'，其后直接引语'how far...'作表语。'once he takes the job'和'if he gets confirmed'为并列的状语从句。

sentences.en: But I think just by the nature of what you look in the grand scheme of things overall, this is a great celebration of our country's founding, and we should come to Washington and take part in it.
sentences.cn: 但我认为，从整体大局来看，这是一场伟大的国家建国庆典，我们应该来华盛顿参加。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+介词短语（by the nature of...）+宾语从句（what you look...）+并列句（this is...and we should...）
sentences.analysis: 主句'I think'后省略了that。'by the nature of...'为方式状语，其中'what you look...'为宾语从句。'in the grand scheme of things overall'为插入语。主句后为两个并列的句子：'this is...'和'we should...'。

sentences.en: And I think the other part of this, Erica, is that there are so many states in this country that have felt attacked by this president because they have been attacked by this president figuratively and literally.
sentences.cn: 我认为另一部分，埃里卡，是这个国家有这么多州感到被这位总统攻击，因为他们确实在比喻和字面意义上受到了这位总统的攻击。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+表语从句（the other part...is that...）+定语从句（that have felt...）+原因状语从句（because...）
sentences.analysis: 主句'I think'后接表语从句'the other part...is that...'。'that have felt attacked'为定语从句修饰states。'because...'为原因状语从句，其中'figuratively and literally'为并列状语。

sentences.en: And I think now you see there's over 40 players that have gone through the MLS academies, and MLS that are playing in the tournament.
sentences.cn: 我认为现在你看到有超过40名球员经历过MLS青训营，并且MLS有球员正在参加锦标赛。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+宾语从句（you see...）+并列结构（there's...and...）
sentences.analysis: 主句'I think'后接宾语从句'you see...'。宾语从句中为并列结构：'there's over 40 players that...'和'MLS that...'。第一个'that'引导定语从句修饰players，第二个'that'引导定语从句修饰MLS（指MLS的球员）。

topics.title: 美伊核协议与中东局势
topics.content: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成‘伟大协议’，但伊朗和以色列均表示不知情。协议可能包括60天停火、限制核计划等，但以色列总理内塔尼亚胡反对，认为未参与谈判。分析人士指出，特朗普多次宣称战争结束，但实际进展有限。
topics.keywords: Iran nuclear deal, ceasefire, Strait of Hormuz, Netanyahu, Trump

topics.title: 共和党‘跛脚鸭’议员的反抗
topics.content: 在初选中失去特朗普支持的共和党议员（如南希·梅斯、约翰·科宁）在任期最后几个月变得直言不讳，批评特朗普的自私决策和盲目忠诚要求，可能阻碍特朗普议程。分析认为这反映了党内对特朗普领导的不满。
topics.keywords: lame duck, GOP, primary, Trump endorsement, rebellion

topics.title: UFC与白宫合作及软实力争议
topics.content: 国务卿卢比奥与UFC签署谅解备忘录，将其纳入体育特使项目，并比喻为‘登月’。批评者质疑其软实力价值，指出UFC与政府关系日益紧密，可能涉及商业利益。同时，白宫草坪搭建UFC擂台引发争议。
topics.keywords: UFC, Marco Rubio, soft power, sports envoy, White House

topics.title: UFC与特朗普的政治联盟
topics.content: UFC（终极格斗冠军赛）与特朗普政府关系密切，UFC帮助特朗普在2021年1月6日国会山事件后恢复声誉，并在2024年大选中支持其竞选。这种联盟被视为政治化，引发媒体和公众讨论。
topics.keywords: UFC, Trump, political alliance, reputation laundering, January 6th

topics.title: 美国250周年庆典与政治分歧
topics.content: 为庆祝美国建国250周年，特朗普总统提议举办“大美国州博览会”（Great American State Fair），但多个民主党州因费用和政治化担忧而退出。同时，特朗普将原计划的音乐会改为政治集会，进一步加剧了党派分歧。
topics.keywords: 250th anniversary, Great American State Fair, partisan, Freedom 250, state fair

topics.title: 2026年世界杯在美国举办
topics.content: 2026年世界杯在北美举行，美国队首战对阵巴拉圭。前美国队队长卡洛斯·博卡内格拉讨论美国队的实力、球迷热情以及世界杯对美国足球发展的推动作用。
topics.keywords: World Cup 2026, US Men's National Team, soccer, MLS, Carlos Bocanegra

topics.title: 国家广场草地刻字事件
topics.content: 在国家广场草地上出现数字“8647”，该数字与反对特朗普的暗号有关，并涉及前FBI局长詹姆斯·科米的起诉。内政部称其为“疯狂的破坏行为”，并展开调查。
topics.keywords: National Mall, vandalism, 8647, Trump opposition, James Comey

topics.title: 特朗普提名国家情报总监
topics.content: 特朗普提名杰伊·克莱顿（Jay Clayton）担任国家情报总监，克莱顿现任纽约南区联邦检察官，缺乏情报背景但受特朗普信任。此前提名比尔·普尔特因无情报经验遭强烈反对。
topics.keywords: Director of National Intelligence, Jay Clayton, Bill Pulte, confirmation, intelligence experience

topics.title: 司法部选举欺诈指控争议
topics.content: 司法部官员公开承诺将提起选举欺诈指控，违反司法部规定，引发对选举公正性的担忧。评论认为特朗普政府利用司法部质疑选举结果。
topics.keywords: Department of Justice, election fraud, voter fraud, unorthodox, Trump administration
